title: Funko Mystery Mini - Disney - the Mandalorian - 1 Of 12 to Collect - Styles Vary - Star Wars: the Mandalorian - Collectable Vinyl Figure - Gift Idea - Official Merchandise - Toys for Kids & Adults
features: MYSTERY MINI FIGURE - With every purchase you 1 Blind Box containing only one random figure per single package.
TINY, DETAILED COLLECTIBLES - Enjoy 3.4 inches (9 cm) Officially licensed merchandise of Star Wars: The Mandalorian; Warning: not for children under 3 years old, Choking Hazard.
PERFECT GIFT FOR TELEVISION FANS - Ideal for comic, movie, and series enthusiasts, these collectable Bitty Pops! bring excitement and joy to any occasion, appealing to both kids and adults.

CAPTIVATING CAKE TOPPERS - transform your special moments using them as eye-catching cake toppers, they are perfect for birthdays, and special events, making every occasion magical and memorable for children and adults alike

VERSATILE PARTY ESSENTIALS - Use as party bag fillers for kids, Christmas stocking surprises, and eye-catching cake toppers, adding a special touch to birthdays and events. Please note that specific items cannot be requested.
